title: AI Location Control: Give Clients FULL Power! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses how clients should have full control over AI operations and geographical deployment decisions. The piece emphasizes that complete control over artificial intelligence infrastructure is critical for proper client governance.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that clients should hold full control over AI operations and geographical deployment decisions. The point is that complete control over AI infrastructure matters for proper client governance. The discussion touches on enterprise AI, energy infrastructure, and edge deployment.
